narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp G (precinct in Warren County) has 781 registered voters, with 41.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.4 percentage points.
